title: Anthropic says Claude Fable 5 is returning with new jailbreak routing safeguards
friendlyTitle: Claude Fable 5 is coming back, but with new safety checks
summary: Anthropic has been cleared to bring Claude Fable 5 back online globally after export-control restrictions, while routing blocked requests to Opus 4.8 through a new classifier aimed at a reported jailbreak technique.
friendlySummary: Anthropic's powerful Claude Fable 5 model is being restored after restrictions. Some risky requests may be blocked and sent to another Claude model instead.
whyItMatters: Frontier-model access is becoming a policy, safety and product-availability issue, not just a model-quality question. Users and businesses that rely on top models need fallback plans when access rules or safety filters change overnight.
friendlyWhyItMatters: If you use top AI models for work, access can change quickly. It is smart to have backup tools and not depend on one model only.
